name: property managers managing 5–15 leases/month tool
description: For property managers managing 5–15 leases/month, manual tracking of lease dates causes missed renewals. We automate lease management instead of manual tracking of lease dates and reminders.
problem_solved: Managing lease expirations and renewals efficiently.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Managing lease expirations and renewals efficiently.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of lease dates and reminders
